title: Approaches to marketing strategy
summary: 9609 A Level — market penetration, development, product development, diversification.
learningObjectives: Assess risk of each growth option.

simpleExplanation.title: Four ways to grow
simpleExplanation.summary: Ansoff's matrix guides whether to sell more existing products in current or new markets, or develop new products.
